headers.value: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' https://w.soundcloud.com https://soundcloud.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.soundcloud.com https://w.soundcloud.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://w.soundcloud.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; media-src *;
